title: Vermilion v1.1.0 Landing & Split Routing
content:
Vermilion has been updated to v1.1.0, introducing split-routing and a custom landing page.

Key additions:

  • Split Routing Architecture: Configured local Vite dev servers and production Apache rules to serve a static landing page at the root URL (/) and route the main SPA to (/home).
  • Aesthetic Customization: Synced the landing page accent color (#dc2626) with the red brand square on the homepage, and added custom editorial copy.
  • UI Layout Refinement: Fixed a layout overflow bug in the sequence renaming block by shortening padding digit options and applying flex constraints.
  • Routing Loop Correction: Resolved a dev-server redirect loop by base-prefixing the SPA index rewrite targets.
